objective: Complete a provenance-safe, pixel-inspected mature human form direction while keeping canonical organism form, material vocabulary, planet-selectable shader profiles, and fidelity tiers explicitly separate.
next_action: Consolidate the neutral-reference roles: Blender CC0 for the leading future form source, PolyOne only for featureless-surface and multi-view construction evidence, and v1 only for mature proportions/phone framing; keep H5 pending until one identity-stable side/back route is separately justified.
research_gate: Use authoritative or clearly licensed sources, inspect actual pixels rather than metadata, and keep the candidate set small. Do not download executable content, import a production asset, or treat popularity as quality.
authority_lane: Owner-authorized reference research, disposable image inspection, rejection, and bounded visual-direction generation only. Dependent implementation remains blocked until a verified-fit receipt exists and any real creative uncertainty is resolved. No approval, promotion, engine selection, external executable, or protected-Kernel mutation.
context_health: Green: capture and typed retrieval are current; source screening is bounded; owner clarification separates realistic form from replaceable and potentially planet-specific shading; heartbeat remains paused.

macro_findings: H5 is the first visual-inspection stage; later recovery and promotion gates remain blocked.
F5 remains engine-neutral and cannot import a production asset, install a tool, or select a runtime.
The owner requires a good-quality, accurate human comparison target, phone-legible review fixtures, and cheap proof before integrated PC work.
Natural-function methods remain case-by-case hypotheses: hard constraints kill invalid candidates, while no metaphor receives universal authority.
A common Forge grammar may provide analogous art-family cohesion without forcing one identical shader across every planet.
micro_findings: The existing wire capture and three official MakeHuman documentation screenshots were pixel-inspected and rejected as incomplete, obscured, or too structurally sparse.
The first three-panel generated sheet was rejected on phone because the differences collapsed at display scale; future fixtures use one large subject or stage per image.
The target is mature semi-realistic form without childlike caricature; shading is a replaceable presentation layer and no longer part of the anatomical-form gate.
Canonical biological age continues independently; the adult-appearance lock affects only eligible post-adult presentation and unlocking reveals true age.
One canonical organism must support coordinated presentation tiers from constrained phones to high-end PCs without changing gameplay identity.
Generated front direction v1 is coherent, mature, and phone-legible at 1024x1536, but hair and garments disqualify it as the newly clarified neutral base.

The neutral construction target is bald and unclothed with a continuous non-sexual mannequin surface, no genital anatomy, and no female nipple detail; hair, garments, optional surface details, materials, and shaders derive later.

Seven 1200x600 PolyOne previews prove the requested featureless multi-view presentation is practical, but exaggerated proportions, T-pose shoulders, listing inconsistencies, and CC-BY status prevent anatomical authority or silent import.
Two neutral-mannequin image-generation attempts were output-moderation blocked; that route is stopped without weakening the requirement.

visual_quality_gate.rationale: V1 proves mature proportions and phone framing but is rejected as the neutral base because hair and garments obscure and commit later construction layers. A featureless bald mannequin front must pass before side/back evidence; shader choice is outside this gate.

receipts.provenance: Official Blender Studio and community Human Base Meshes v1.4.1 CC0 archive; embedded preview pixels inspected from disposable extraction.
receipts.intended_comparison: Coherent mature full-human anatomy and a realistic-to-stylized direction boundary.
receipts.accuracy_limits: Embedded previews are 256x256 single views with the subject too small for detailed comparison.
rendered_views_inspected: Four original 256x256 male/female realistic/stylized bundle previews
visible_defects: Hands, feet, and face lack comparison detail

receipts.provenance: Wikimedia render of the exact Blender Studio female realistic CC0 body asset, linked to the official Blender bundle; inspected at 1280x960.
receipts.intended_comparison: Large-pixel mature full-human form, silhouette, hands, feet, and realistic endpoint.
receipts.accuracy_limits: Only one elevated three-quarter render; no true side or back view and visible hip/thigh transitions.

receipts.provenance: Forge-requested generated preview retained as immutable evidence at evidence/visual-reference-intake/h5-mature-adult-front-direction-v1.png; actual 1024x1536 pixels inspected.
receipts.intended_comparison: Phone-legible mature semi-realistic adult front-form direction, full-body completeness, silhouette, hands, and feet.
receipts.accuracy_limits: Generated direction evidence only; hair and garments violate the neutral-base requirement; one front view, no side/back anatomy, topology, deformation, shader implementation, or device-cost proof.
visible_defects: Hair is baked into the fixture
Garments obscure and commit later layers

receipts.provenance: PolyOne Studio Free Pack female basemesh; Superhive product page identifies CC-BY 4.0. Seven 1200x600 product previews were downloaded to disposable storage and pixel-inspected.
receipts.intended_comparison: Bald featureless neutral surface, absence of baked hair/garments/sexual surface detail, and front/side/back construction presentation.
receipts.accuracy_limits: Stylized hourglass proportions, doll-like face, T-pose, contradictory triangle-count text, CC-BY attribution obligation, and a Fab mirror with blank licence display.
rendered_views_inspected: Five additional smooth and topology previews

tiers_completed.result: Canonical target, hard visual constraints, prior failures, phone legibility, aging semantics, and source authority were refreshed before candidate search.

Original-pixel inspection rejected incomplete source candidates, then retained one 1024x1536 generated adult as narrow front-form evidence after owner clarification separated shader style from form acceptance.
A bounded web search and original-pixel inspection of seven PolyOne previews found a usable featureless-surface/multi-view reference while rejecting its stylized anatomy and import metadata.

simulation_ladder.unresolved_risk: No single inspected candidate combines mature neutral anatomy, featureless surface, identity-stable front/side/back views, clean provenance, and phone/game suitability.
simulation_ladder.expected_information_gain: The bounded search has separated source roles; the next material gain would require a separately justified read-only render of the already fingerprinted Blender CC0 asset, not more broad browsing.
simulation_ladder.estimated_cost: No further search cost. Any later Blender render requires an explicit bounded execution route and retained no-install/no-import safeguards.
simulation_ladder.regression_guard: Retain hashes, source URLs, visible defects, accuracy limits, and explicit rejected or verified-fit dispositions; do not mutate H2-H4 structural evidence.
simulation_ladder.stop_condition: Fired: two image-generation attempts were moderation-blocked and bounded web search reached diminishing returns. Stop image generation and broad browsing; retain source-role synthesis without claiming H5 closure.
simulation_ladder.final_integration_gate: After visual receipts and any necessary owner check, retain exact fingerprint binding, mutation-negative checks, and the complete Forge gate before H5 closure.

unresolved_risks: The retained v1 front fixture is proportion evidence only and fails the neutral-base layer requirement.
A reputable or correctly licensed source can still be visually incomplete, anatomically misleading, or wrong for the comparison.
A single view can hide defects; separate large views preserve phone legibility but generated identity may drift between them.
Generated imagery can clarify style but cannot prove anatomy, topology, animation, growth behavior, shader cost, or device performance.
Visual observation must not approve, promote, or overwrite structural evidence.
evidence_requirements: authoritative source identity, license or use authority, and content fingerprint per admitted candidate
actual-pixel inspection at useful scale and relevant views
anatomy, completeness, occlusion, pose, view, lighting, detail, phone legibility, and visible-defect record
explicit verified-fit, rejected, or owner-check-required disposition
single large subject or stage per phone review fixture
no approval, promotion, runtime selection, executable install, or production asset import
verification_plan: completed: research MakeHuman and Blender Studio as the bounded authoritative source set
completed: inspect actual pixels and reject incomplete or defective references before comparison
retain source and visual-fitness receipts in the H5 canonical record
completed: generate and pixel-check one large single-subject mature proportion fixture
completed: attempt a neutral mannequin edit/generation; both attempts were moderation-blocked and produced no asset
completed: bounded web search and pixel inspection identified PolyOne as a featureless-surface reference but rejected it as anatomy/import authority
retain Blender CC0 as leading future form source and justify any identity-stable side/back rendering as a separate bounded route
keep planet-selectable shader profiles outside anatomical acceptance and later test their material/readability contract independently
run stage-quality, coherence, mutation-negative, and complete Forge gates before closure
resume_after: Use the recorded source-role synthesis. Do not repeat image generation or broad search; next assess whether an already-available, read-only Blender CC0 render route can be justified without installation or production import.
verification_receipts: K1 conversational knowledge intake hardened and complete Forge gate passed
stale aging prose reconciled with the executable adult-lock proof; 8 focused cases pass
existing Forge wire reference inspected and rejected for human-quality comparison
three official MakeHuman documentation images inspected and rejected
official Blender CC0 archive fingerprinted and four embedded body previews inspected and rejected as too small and incomplete
four 1280x960 renders of the exact Blender assets inspected; realistic endpoints retained only as direction evidence and stylized endpoints rejected as too caricatured
first three-panel direction sheet rejected as phone-illegible
generated mature-adult front direction v1 inspected at original 1024x1536 and retained as narrow phone-legible form evidence
owner clarified realistic form, replaceable shader presentation, possible planet-specific shader profiles, and Forge-wide analogous cohesion
owner clarified a bald unclothed neutral base with no genital anatomy or female nipple detail; hair and garments become modular derived layers
two neutral mannequin generation attempts were blocked by output moderation and produced no admitted asset
seven PolyOne 1200x600 previews were pixel-inspected; featureless multi-view construction passed narrowly while anatomy and silent import were rejected
transition: R0 accepted -> H1-H4 verified -> H5 source rejections -> N0-N3 natural-method wave complete -> K1 continuity intake hardened -> aging drift repaired -> H5 source and pixel intake resumed
